zh.lifeSummary: King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway於1204年6月出生在挪威奧斯特福爾德霍波爾福爾肯包格。他於大約1221年與Kanga the Younger of Folkinsberg結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1202年在挪威被列為king。他去世於1263年12月16日在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼吉可瓦爾享年59歲，埋葬在挪威霍爾達藍德伯根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway于1204年6月出生在挪威奧斯特福爾德霍波爾福爾肯包格。他于大约1221年与Kanga the Younger of Folkinsberg结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1202年在挪威被列为king。他去世于1263年12月16日在英国苏格兰奧可尼吉可瓦爾享年59岁，埋葬在挪威霍爾達藍德伯根。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Norway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the country of Norway. Compare   Norrie  .

variants.name: Northway
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places called with Middle English bi northe weie ‘(place) to the north of the way or road’, including Northway in Monkleigh, Widecombe in the Moor, and Parkham, Norway in Whitestone, Narraway in Drewsteignton (all Devon), and Northway in Halse (Somerset).

variants.name: Norrie
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Aberdeenshire): habitational name from the country of Norway (reflecting the Scandinavian form Norge). Compare Norway .

nameMeanings.name: Haakon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

variants.name: Hagen
meanings: 1 Germanic: short form of various compound names formed with hag ‘stockade, enclosure’.

variants.name: Hakon
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

variants.name: Håkan
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

en.lifeSummary: King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway was born in June 1204, in Folkenborg, Hobøl, Østfold, Norway. He married Kanga the Younger of Folkinsberg about 1221. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1202, his occupation is listed as king in Norway. He died on 16 December 1263, in Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Bergen, Hordaland, Norway.

fr.lifeSummary: King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway est né en juin 1204, à Folkenborg, Hobøl, Østfold, Norvège. Il a épousé Kanga the Younger of Folkinsberg environ 1221. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1202, sa profession de son indiquée est king à Norvège. Il est décédé le 16 décembre 1263, à Kirkwall, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Bergen, Hordaland, Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway wurde im Juni 1204 in Folkenborg, Hobøl, Østfold, Norwegen geboren. Er hat um 1221 Kanga the Younger of Folkinsberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1202 ist sein Beruf als king in Norwegen aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. Dezember 1263 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Kirkwall, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Bergen, Hordaland, Norwegen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway è nato il nel giugno 1204 nel Folkenborg, Hobøl, Østfold, Norvegia. Lui sposato Kanga the Younger of Folkinsberg circa 1221. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1202, la sua occupazione è indicata come king nel Norvegia. Morì il 16 dicembre 1263, nel Kirkwall, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Bergen, Hordaland, Norvegia.

ja.lifeSummary: King Haakon Haakonsson of Norwayは1204年6月にノルウェーoストフォルドホーブoルフォルケンボルグで生まれた。約1221年にKanga the Younger of Folkinsbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1202年，ノルウェーでの職業はkingと記録されている。彼は1263年12月16日にイギリススコットランドオルクニーキルクワルで59歳で死去し，ノルウェーホールダランドバージェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway(은)는 1204년 6월 노르웨이 o스트폴드 홉o 폴켄볼그에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1221년 Kanga the Younger of Folkinsberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1202년, 그의 직업은 노르웨이에서 king이었다. 그는 1263년 12월 16일 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 커크월에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 노르웨이 호르다랜드 버겐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway nasceu em junho de 1204, em Folkenborg, Hobøl, Østfold, Noruega. Ele casou-se com Kanga the Younger of Folkinsberg aproximadamente 1221. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1202, sua profissão aparece como king em Noruega. Ele faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1263, em Kirkwall, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Bergen, Hordaland, Noruega.

ro.Sumburgh-Roost ,Shetland, Scotland: Sumburgh, Mainland, Shetland, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway родился июнь 1204 г. в местности фолкенборг, хобoл, oстфолд, Норвегия. Он женился на женщине по имени Kanga the Younger of Folkinsberg около 1221 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1202 году он работал по профессии king в местности Норвегия. Он умер 16 декабря 1263 г. в местности кирквалл, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности биржен, хаурдаланд, Норвегия.

es.lifeSummary: King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway nació en junio de 1204, en Folkenborg, Hobøl, Østfold, Noruega. Se casó con Kanga the Younger of Folkinsberg aproximadamente 1221. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1202, su ocupación registrada era king en Noruega. Murió el 16 de diciembre de 1263, en Kirkwall, Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Bergen, Hordaland, Noruega.
